payload.hypothesis: Single-event geopolitics traders with first appearance within 30 days of resolution show statistically higher PnL than those entering earlier (lifecycle insider detection heuristic)
payload.expected_improvement: Candidate group (n=69) shows higher PnL distribution than control (n=160) at p < 0.05 (observed: p=0.0067 one-tailed Mann-Whitney U, clean sample excluding known bots)
validation_tasks: Verify Mann-Whitney U test methodology and p=0.0067 result
Confirm that bot exclusion from control group is appropriate (69.7% known bots in raw control)
Assess whether n=2 distinct events provides sufficient statistical validity
Check if Iran market (mislabeled title) should be excluded — would reduce candidates from 69 to 25
Evaluate forward-simulation potential: can the heuristic be applied prospectively to new events?
payload.join_key_correction: integration-contract.md condition_id join is incorrect. Use m.market_id = t.market_id (3,541,160 matches vs 2,241,596 for condition_id join)

signals.validation_summary: V2 correction: pooled p=0.0160 (one-tailed MWU, n=59 candidates vs n=90 control). V1 Haley p=0.0000 was a market-scale confound — corrected. Neither event individually significant (Haley p=0.1087, Iran p=0.4818). Claimed p=0.0067 not reproducible. N=2 events insufficient. Effect size r=0.208 (small-medium). Bot exclusion valid. insider_signals table already implements this pattern with 7 detections. Deploy as watchlist trigger via existing infrastructure only.
action_items: Validate 7 existing insider_signals records as markets resolve (primary validation path)
Resolve Iran market title via Gamma API (condition_id: 0xdf31a15ee2f55b675d44882cbb2053a72b83ad40eef5d60b11762517f695f4ba)
Confirm insider_signals uses Gamma API wallet creation date vs first-trade proxy
Run heuristic on Unknown-category markets for additional validation events

payload.hypothesis: RQ-GEO-ELO-003: geo_elo tier discrimination (67%/69.5%/73.7% LEGENDARY/ELITE/QUALIFIED) holds out-of-sample when trained on pre-2026 trades and tested on 2026 trades
payload.result_summary: Formal failure: LEGENDARY OOS 9.4% (n=64, 1 market, 2 traders). QUALIFIED OOS 58.7% (n=167, 4 markets). INCONCLUSIVE due to sample concentration. Failure condition fires but not statistically meaningful.
payload.column_written: traders.geo_elo_oos (435 Pool C traders, pre-2026 training)
validation_tasks: Verify OOS ELO computation: 177,564 pre-2026 geo trades processed correctly, K-factor dynamic
Confirm LEGENDARY concentration: 64 trades from 2 traders in 1 market (Russia-Ukraine ceasefire Q2)
Assess whether 6 OOS markets is sufficient to accept/reject the hypothesis
Review QUALIFIED OOS (58.7%, 4 markets) — is this directional evidence for partial validity?
Recommend: continue accumulating OOS data or formally suspend geo_elo as STR-003 qualifier

pending.note: OOS validation complete — CONDITIONAL result, data sparsity. See brain/agent-outputs/quant-research/GEO-ELO-003/

payload.title: Geopolitics-Conditioned ELO for Geopolitics Market Prediction
payload.motivation: LEGENDARY tier accuracy 46% (n=80, HIGH confidence) — below baseline as of Run #8 2026-05-25. Root cause: comprehensive_elo pools all categories including sports/crypto. QUALIFIED geopolitics accuracy 92.3% vs LEGENDARY 46% confirms category-pollution hypothesis.
payload.hypothesis: geo_elo (Geopolitics + Elections trades only) will show LEGENDARY tier accuracy >= 60% for geopolitics markets, vs current 46% under comprehensive_elo
payload.expected_improvement: LEGENDARY geo_elo accuracy >= 60% (vs 46% platform-wide), closing gap with QUALIFIED
payload.failure_condition: geo_elo LEGENDARY accuracy < 55% across 50+ geopolitics markets
phases: Phase 1: Calculate geo_elo for all traders using Geopolitics + Elections trades only (~2h)
Phase 2: Re-run accuracy check using geo_elo tiers on geopolitics markets (~1h)
Phase 3: If passes, propose STR-003 update to use geo_elo as qualifier (~30min)
payload.schema_note: JOIN key: trades.market_id = markets.market_id (NOT condition_id). New column: traders.geo_elo REAL DEFAULT NULL.
payload.awaiting: Oscar approval before Phase 1 begins — no geo_elo calculation has been run yet

payload.reason: Only 10 traders meet both period ≥20-position requirements. Period 2 has not accumulated enough resolved markets. Reschedule for July 1 2026.

anomalies: Pool grew 7951→11970 since 2026-05-18 (7 days). Recommend Oscar review of daily_maintenance.py logs.
All 21 verified legendary traders (≥10 resolved trades) disqualified by excessive concurrent markets (15–1626). STR-003 focus criterion structurally incompatible with validated traders.
Stale market inflation ongoing — 5 of 7 concurrent markets for Signal 3 key trader are 2025/template. Stale cleanup still outstanding.
payload.action_required: Signal 2 (UN Security Council) awaiting Oscar decision on stale-market exclusion policy (open since 2026-05-18). Signal 4 (Putin) approaching resolution ~June 2026 — record outcome in strategy-registry.md.
